prompt: An anime-style illustration of a figure leaning against a textured stone wall in a narrow, sunlit alleyway. The figure has a {argument name="head type" default="large yellow smiling emoji with rosy cheeks"} for a head. They wear a {argument name="outfit" default="loose black overcoat, black shirt, wide-leg black trousers, and black dress shoes"}. The character's left foot rests on a stone block, right hand in pocket, and left hand near the neck. The scene includes reflective stone pavement, a distant streetlamp, and golden-lit foliage. The lighting features dramatic chiaroscuro and sharp shadows.
translatedPrompt: 一张动漫风格的插画，描绘了一个人随意地靠在质感十足的石墙上，背景为 {argument name="setting" default="狭窄且阳光明媚的鹅卵石小巷"}。人物身着 {argument name="clothing" default="全黑西装和长款大衣"}，一只手托在下巴附近，另一只手插在口袋里。一条腿抬起，一只黑色皮鞋踩在石块上。角色的面部完全被一个 {argument name="face covering" default="巨大的黄色害羞笑脸表情符号"} 遮挡。场景采用了戏剧性的 {argument name="lighting" default="高对比度的斑驳阳光"}，光线穿过附近的叶片，在深色的衣物和粗糙的墙面上投下锐利而复杂的阴影。整体氛围时尚且神秘，色调采用了温暖的黄金时刻风格。

breakdown.creativeCore: 身着黑衣、面部为表情符号的人物：生成一张动漫风格的插画，描绘一个穿着时尚的人靠在墙上，面部被表情符号遮挡，呈现出戏剧性的光影效果。
breakdown.subject: 服饰
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[景别/角度/版式层级/主体位置]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: anime]。

Lighting and camera:
[光线/镜头/景深/质感]。

Text requirements:
包含文字或排版元素。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
